title: opithandra dalzielii
intro: Opithandra dalzielii, also known as Dalziel's Opithandra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to West Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Opithandra dalzielii include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve coughs, and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory conditions. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, with the leaves and stems being used for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
